title: OpenCROW
summary: Offensive-workflow workstation bootstrap for Codex agents with a dedicated Conda environment and domain-specific tooling.
description: OpenCROW is an offensive-workflow workstation bootstrap for Codex agents that provisions a dedicated Conda environment, installs native and Python tooling for pwn, reversing, cryptography, and protocol analysis, and syncs vendored skills into ~/.codex/skills for tighter, domain-specific agent routing. It is designed to reduce setup friction during CTFs and security research by giving both the user and the agent a reproducible, modular, ready-to-use environment.
highlights: Modular toolbox design with separated crypto, pwn, reversing, network, and async workflow skills
Bootstrap installer for Conda-based CTF environments on Ubuntu and Debian systems
Integrated native tooling for exploitation, debugging, symbolic execution, disassembly, and analysis
Vendored Codex skills for persistent SSH, TCP, SageMath, and Minecraft-based challenge workflows
